name: ls
description: Compact ls output: reformats long listings to date+name+size, removes noise, extension summary

total 16
drwxr-xr-x  3 user staff   96 Apr 23 14:13 .claude

Apr 28 09:19  .git  480
Apr 23 13:47  .mcp.json  171
Apr 28 10:00  README.md  1234
Apr 28 09:19  main.go  500

md: 1
go: 1
